summary.application_dependent_caveat: The application must choose a threshold suited to its own error-cost and quality conditions; 40 is the official starting recommendation frozen here.
summary.fmr_approximation_caveat: The official association between threshold 40 and FMR 0.01% is approximate and varies with fingerprint quality; it is not an observed result of this benchmark.
summary.paraphrased_recommendation: FingerprintMatcher.match returns a non-negative similarity score that increases with similarity. Compare the unrounded score with score >= threshold; the official Java documentation recommends threshold 40 as a starting point.
